editor.loadingDescription: Bringing in work types, rates and the entry surface.
editor.noWorkTypesDescription: Finish onboarding or add a work type before creating entries.
editor.description: Fast, calm, and adapted to the work type you choose.
editor.unitQuantityHint: Enter quantities for the units you completed. Leave unused units at zero.
editor.noUnitTypesTitle: This work type has no unit types yet.
editor.noUnitTypesDescription: Unit types define what you count, such as normal rooms, junior rooms or suites.

delete.title: Delete this entry?
delete.description: This removes the entry and returns you to the dashboard.

validation.positiveOrZeroQuantity: Use zero or a positive quantity
validation.completeTimeOrUnits: Complete either the time details or the unit rows
validation.timeRequired: Start and end time are required.
validation.invalidTimeRange: Check the time range and break minutes.
validation.configureUnitTypes: Configure unit types before creating this entry.
validation.positiveUnitQuantity: Enter at least one positive unit quantity.
